productDisplayName: Puma Women's Logo Plus Black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 35% cotton, 65% polyester, softly ribbed neckline and cuff, graphic print on the front in metallic colour and brand tab appliqued on the left hemFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash with like colours in lukewarm water at 40 degrees Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Cool iron Do not dry clean Simple, understated and hot: that's the look of this black t-shirt from puma. The metallic colour on the front adds bling to this super soft tee. Team it with jeans, capris or shorts, and look wow.
